item.title: EDX Markets Closes $76M Series C Led by SBI Holdings
item.description: EDX Markets, an institutional-only crypto trading venue with its own central clearinghouse, closed a $76 million Series C funding round led by SBI Holdings, the firm said in a press release. The Tokyo-listed financial group becomes a strategic investor in the U.S. exchange. The capital will fund…

item.title: Save the date: Swiss AI Safety Days 2026 (7-8 November, ETH Zurich)
item.description: pspanSwiss AI Safety Days 2026 is the next chapter of the Zurich AI Safety Day. Last year, our inaugural 2025 event was named Best Event in Swiss AI Weeks. It set the bar for a new format of AI safety conferences being replicated in Europe, and brought together 200+ participants and 20+ organisation

item.title: José explains why crypto projects need a clearer link between tokens and equity. "I think what we found is the vast majority of valuable crypto projects need an equity company... We need to figure out
item.description: pJosé explains why crypto projects need a clearer link between tokens and equity.br /br /"I think what we found is the vast majority of valuable crypto projects need an equity company... We need to figure out a structure for where the token can have some kind of programmatic or contractual value cap

item.title: RT by @glassnode: The STH Cost Basis Distribution heatmap shows a fresh wave of supply rotating into new buyers' hands over the $62k-$65k range, during the rally from $57k. This is a double-edged stru
item.description: pThe STH Cost Basis Distribution heatmap shows a fresh wave of supply rotating into new buyers' hands over the $62k-$65k range, during the rally from $57k.br /br /This is a double-edged structure. On one hand, buyers aggressive accumulated into the strength create a potential cost basis floor that c

item.title: Michael Saylor Opposes BIP 110, Says Bitcoin Needs “Guardians of Neutrality” Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor published an article titled “110 Reasons BIP 110 Is a Bad Idea,” opposing the pr
item.description: pMichael Saylor Opposes BIP 110, Says Bitcoin Needs “Guardians of Neutrality”br /br /Strategy Executive Chairman Michael Saylor published an article titled “110 Reasons BIP 110 Is a Bad Idea,” opposing the proposal to restrict certain Bitcoin transaction types through consensus changes. item.description: pCobie: Coinbase Has Long Been Distant From Crypto-Native Usersbr /br /KOL Rune asked Coinbase trading product lead Cobie how the Base App plans to attract onchain users after trust in the Base ecosystem was damaged. item.description: pSpot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs Record $132M and $36.73M in Net Inflowsbr /br /According to SoSoValue data, on July 17 (ET), spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded total net inflows of $132 million, while spot Ethereum ETFs recorded total net inflows of $36.73 million./pimg src="https://nitter.net/pic/media%2FH

item.title: France Blocks Access to Polymarket Website According to Reuters, France’s gambling regulator ANJ has ordered internet service providers to block access to prediction market platform Polymarket, allegi
item.description: pFrance Blocks Access to Polymarket Websitebr /br /According to Reuters, France’s gambling regulator ANJ has ordered internet service providers to block access to prediction market platform Polymarket, alleging that it offers illegal gambling services. The regulator said the platform could expose us
